issues_found: Render auto-deploy stuck on old commit 99c8a88 due to SyntaxError in growth/index.js
Service modal DOM had CSS transition issues with Tailwind classes
Stripe keys not set in Render environment
fixes_applied: Fixed modal bug: bypassed Tailwind hidden !important by using inline style.display and opacity, ensuring transitions work
Removed duplicate 'normalizePhone' declaration in growth/index.js causing deploy crash
Fixed Stripe synchronous initialization crash in index.js by implementing getStripe() lazy initialization
Fixed Modal display issues by correctly toggling the Tailwind 'hidden' class
Pushed Modal UI hotfix to origin/main (commit 7995c58)
Bypassed Stripe: modified startCheckout() to route directly to autonomous WhatsApp bot (commit bbe02b8)
